title: GTA VI + GPT-6: Rockstar's AI Mechanics Revealed
summary: A YouTube video debunking viral claims that GTA 6 uses GPT-6, instead arguing Rockstar built custom AI systems for real-time behavioral simulation, persistent NPC memory, and witness systems via RAGE 9 engine. The creator compares LLM responses and attempts to separate confirmed technical details from leaked rumors.
writeup: The video addresses viral claims that GTA 6 runs on GPT-6, arguing instead that Rockstar built custom AI systems through its RAGE 9 engine for real-time behavioral simulation, persistent NPC memory, and witness systems. It matters because it separates confirmed technical details from leaked rumors that have circulated about the game. The creator compares LLM responses to illustrate the difference between a general-purpose language model and purpose-built NPC and world-simulation systems.
